/usr/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/send_command.dir/send_command.cc.o CMakeFiles/send_command.dir/CommandSender.cc.o CMakeFiles/send_command.dir/CommandBuilder.cc.o CMakeFiles/send_command.dir/CommandSaver.cc.o -o send_command   -L/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_system.dylib
